//: All abilities, party and enemy alike. kind: damage|heal. element must be in combat-tuning elements.list. scaling: the attribute whose value feeds the damage formula (enemies use their 'attack' stat instead). breakPower: how much Toughness a weakness-hit removes. timed: shows the timed-hit bar (party) / is parryable telegraph text via 'telegraph' (enemies).

abilities.name: Strike
abilities.desc: A plain, honest blow. Free, and better than it looks if your timing is true.

abilities.name: Crushing Blow
abilities.desc: Both hands, full turn of the hips. Walls have been apologized to.

abilities.name: Second Wind
abilities.desc: Grit your teeth and remember you're paid by the day. Restores your own health.

abilities.name: Gale Slash
abilities.desc: A blade of compressed wind, argued into existence.

abilities.name: Shear Burst
abilities.desc: A sudden violent pressure-drop. Expensive, loud, deeply satisfying.

abilities.name: Resonant Word
abilities.desc: A single held note the Hush cannot abide. The closest thing it knows to pain.

abilities.name: Mending Chant
abilities.desc: A low, steady cadence that reminds a body of its own rhythm.

abilities.name: Hush-Touch
abilities.desc: A grey limb that deadens what it lands on.
abilities.telegraph: lifts a long grey limb, and the air around it stops carrying sound…

abilities.name: Smothering Veil
abilities.desc: A fold of dead air dropped over the victim like wet felt.
abilities.telegraph: draws the air taut — your ears pop, and the world goes cotton-quiet…

abilities.name: Wisp Drain
abilities.desc: A flicker of cold static that sips warmth and sound together.
abilities.telegraph: flickers, doubling its outline — something reaches out of the blur…
